what_it_does: Defines a 24x24 stroke-only SVG icon showing two people side by side with a small bulb or idea marker above them.
observations: Uses an SVG viewBox of 0 0 24 24 with no explicit width or height.
Sets fill to none and stroke to currentColor with 1.5 stroke width.
Uses rounded stroke caps and joins.
Draws two circular heads at x=8 and x=16 with matching radii.
Draws two arced body outlines that overlap in the center.
Adds a small circle above the people and a short vertical line beneath it as the bulb or idea cue.
standouts: Combines team/person silhouettes with a compact idea marker.
The bulb cue is reduced to a small top circle and short stem.
The geometry is horizontally balanced around the center of the icon.
conventions: Follows common outline-icon conventions: 24x24 viewBox, currentColor stroke, no fill, rounded line endings.
Relies on consumer CSS or inherited color for rendering.
concerns: No title, description, role, or aria metadata is included for standalone accessibility.
No explicit width or height is set, so rendered size depends on the embedding context.
notes: A compact currentColor outline icon for team ideation or collaborative ideas.
questions: Should accessibility labeling be supplied by the consumer or embedded in the SVG?
Is the top marker intended to read as a lightbulb, an idea node, or a shared concept indicator?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches the filename-level purpose: the file renders a team icon with a bulb or idea cue.
intention_signals: It seems intended to communicate a team or group associated with an idea, insight, or creative concept using minimal stroke geometry.
novelty: The bulb idea is represented as a very small abstract marker above the team rather than a full lightbulb outline.
contribution: Contributes a reusable stroke-only icon for representing team-based ideation, collaboration, or shared insight while inheriting color from its rendering context.
summary_for_embedding: This is a 24x24 currentColor SVG outline icon depicting two team members with a small abstract bulb or idea marker above them.
intention_for_embedding: This was for visually signaling collaborative ideation or team-based insight in an icon set.
